definitions: ballads：民谣；叙事歌；抒情歌曲（在这里更接近“抒情歌曲”）

examples.text:
Still nothing? Let me give you a hint. They are all ballads! Now I know what you must be saying. Ballads are a very common choice for
movie theme songs, even in the West.

source.text: Chinese Music - It's Not Dead, It's Misunderstood...
